observed: The Cloudflare deployment workflow previously constructed deployment proof schema 1.0.0 inline.
The committed build-deployment-proof.mjs emits schema 1.1.0 and evaluates Cloudflare Pages URL authority.
The workflow now invokes build-deployment-proof.mjs directly and runs both builder and validator tests before deployment.
inferred: Using one committed builder removes schema drift between workflow-generated proof packets and the validator contract.
proposed: Dispatch the workflow after Cloudflare environment credentials are configured and retain the generated proof and acceptance artifacts.
